app.name: LibreClinica MUW
app.tagline: Clinical study data platform of the Ophthalmology Department

subjectMatrix.title: Subject Matrix
subjectMatrix.empty: No subjects match the current filter.

addSubject.title: Add Study Subject
addSubject.intro: Once saved, the subject's identifying fields cannot be changed without contacting the Study Coordinator. Do not include personally identifying information in Secondary ID.

helper.subjectId: The identifier used in source documents. Cannot be edited after save.

addSubject.phiWarning: Never include name, hospital ID, social security number, or any other identifying data.
addSubject.cancelLink: Cancel and return to Subject Matrix
addSubject.modesHelp: Save modes: "Schedule first event" opens the subject view (event scheduler lands in a later sub-phase). "Add next" keeps you here with a clean form. "Finish" returns to the Subject Matrix.

sdv.title: Source Data Verification
sdv.subTrail: All sites · view by Event CRF
sdv.empty: No CRFs match the current filter.
sdv.selectAllAriaLabel: Select all verifiable CRFs in the current view

confirm.title: Mark as verified?
confirm.body: All {count} selected CRFs will be flipped to Verified (SDV). The action is recorded in the audit log.
confirm.note: If data on a verified CRF is later changed, its SDV status resets to Pending automatically.
confirm.auditNote: Audit trail entry will reference monitor_demo + the timestamp.

query.title: Add Note
query.descriptionPlaceholder: What needs clarifying? Reference the source document if relevant…
query.auditTrailTell: Audit trail entry will reference: monitor_demo · timestamp

notes.title: Notes & Discrepancies
notes.empty: No discrepancies match the current filter.

auditLog.title: Study Audit Log
auditLog.intro: Every data change, sign-off, SDV event, query, and administrative action. Immutable. Filters narrow the view; nothing is ever hidden.
auditLog.empty: No events match the current filter.

buildStudy.title: Build Study
buildStudy.intro: Seven setup tasks. Complete them in any order; each card deep-links to its workflow when the supporting view ships.

create-study.title: Create study
create-study.description: Study metadata, version, OID, sponsor + protocol number.

crf.title: Design CRFs
crf.description: Form library: item grids, response sets, repeating groups.

events.title: Define events
events.description: Visit schedule with per-event CRF assignment + SDV requirement.

rules.title: Validation rules
rules.description: Field-level and cross-form predicates with action types.

users.title: Users
users.description: Per-site Investigators, Monitors, Data Managers, CRCs.

manageUsers.title: Manage Users
manageUsers.searchPlaceholder: Find user by name, username or email…
manageUsers.empty: No users match the current filter.

importCrf.title: Import CRF Data
importCrf.intro: Bulk-load completed CRFs from CDISC ODM XML. The import is staged — nothing is committed until you confirm at the final step.

upload.heading: Upload CDISC ODM 1.3 XML
upload.description: Subject / event / CRF / item must already be defined in the study.

map.heading: Detected counts
map.description: The file was parsed and auto-mapped against the study's structure. Resolve any conflicts in the next step.

preview.errorUnknownItem: Unknown item OID in the current CRF version
preview.warnRange: Out-of-range value — will import + flag for SDV
preview.reasonHint: {count} overwrites require a Reason for Change note. Recorded against every overwritten item in the audit log.
preview.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Site sent corrected ODM after on-site source-data reconciliation.

signSubject.title: Sign Subject {id}
signSubject.intro: Signing attests that the data is complete and accurate to the best of your knowledge. The action is recorded in the audit log and cannot be reversed without an administrator reset.
signSubject.signedToast: {id} signed. Opening the subject detail page…

error.passwordRequired: Password is required to record the e-signature.
error.badPassword: Password does not match — signature not recorded.
error.alreadySigned: Subject is already signed — signing is a one-way action.
error.preflightBlocked: Pre-flight checks block this sign action — resolve the failed checks first.
error.unknown: Could not record the signature — please try again.

signSubject.attestation: By signing below, I, {name} (Investigator, site {site}), attest that to the best of my knowledge the data captured for subject {id} is complete, accurate, and reflects the source documents. This electronic signature is recorded in the regulatory audit log per ICH-GCP and 21 CFR Part 11 §11.50.
signSubject.acknowledgement: I understand that signing locks all CRFs against further edit by site personnel until an administrator reset.

preflight.eventsCompleteTitle: All scheduled events have at least one CRF completed
preflight.eventsCompleteDetail: Every event has data — see the casebook below for the per-event status.
preflight.eventsIncompleteTitle: Some events still have CRFs in progress
preflight.eventsIncompleteDetail: Signing is allowed; CRFs in progress will be locked at their current state.
preflight.crfsCompleteTitle: All required CRFs are marked complete
preflight.crfsIncompleteTitle: Some required CRFs are not marked complete
preflight.openQueriesTitle: {count} open discrepancies attached to this subject
preflight.openQueriesDetail: Open queries do not block signing, but you should reconcile them first when possible.
preflight.noOpenQueriesTitle: No open discrepancies on this subject
preflight.firstSignature: No previous signature on this subject
preflight.alreadySigned: Subject already signed — re-signature recorded as a new audit event

login.brandLine: Department of Ophthalmology and Optometry · Medical University of Vienna
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your institutional credentials.
login.delegatedHint: 2FA, password resets, and account lockout are handled by your identity provider.
login.orLocal: Or sign in with a local account
login.localAccountSummary: Sign in with a local LibreClinica account
login.localPurpose: For sponsor monitors, external personnel, and break-glass accounts that don't have an institutional identity.
login.complianceTell: This is a GCP / 21 CFR Part 11 compliant clinical-data system. All actions are audited.

firstLogin.title: Welcome, {name}
firstLogin.intro: A few details to confirm before you reach the application. 2FA, password lifecycle, and account lockout are managed by your identity provider; the fields below are LibreClinica-local.

helper.displayName: Shown in the audit log, sign-off attestations, and discrepancy threads.

firstLogin.eSignatureExplain: Clinical sign-offs (Sign Subject, Sign Event) re-authenticate you through your identity provider with forceAuthn=true per 21 CFR Part 11 §11.50.
firstLogin.eSignatureAck: I understand that re-authenticating via the identity provider is the binding signature event for clinical attestations.

terms.heading: Terms of use
terms.body1: I understand that LibreClinica MUW is a clinical-data system under ICH-GCP and 21 CFR Part 11 §11.10. Every action I take is recorded in an immutable audit log.
terms.body2: I will not share my credentials, will sign off the system when I leave my workstation, and will protect any subject identifiers visible on screen.
terms.body3: I understand that my role grants access only to data and actions consistent with my study assignment; access outside that scope is flagged in the audit log and reviewed.
terms.ackTerms: I have read and accept the terms above.
terms.ackAuditing: I understand that every action I take is recorded and auditable.

errors.saveFailed: Could not save your profile. Please try again.

studyPicker.title: Choose a study
studyPicker.subtitle: Welcome, {name}. Pick the study you want to work on. You can switch later from the top bar.
studyPicker.empty: You do not have a role on any study yet. Ask the Data Manager to grant you access.

subjectDetail.notFound: Subject {id} not found in the current study.
